privileged_info_summary: Task uses synthetically generated tool lending data with 8 items, 5 of which are intentionally overdue (>30 days out). The overdue threshold is >30 days as verified in verifier.py. Pass criteria requires 4/5 verification checks (80%). Data columns are: Tool Name, Borrower, Date Lent, Expected Return, Value. Task requires adding Days Out (=TODAY()-DateLent) and Status (=IF(days>30,"OVERDUE","OK")) columns with conditional red formatting on OVERDUE cells. Output must be saved as ODS format.
